summary: BidBlitz Credit System (Kredit-System) Testing Complete - All features verified: 1) Backend APIs working: /api/credit/eligibility, /api/credit/admin/applications, /api/credit/admin/stats, 2) BidBlitz Pay has 'Kredit' tab in navigation at /pay route, 3) CreditSystem.jsx component loads showing eligibility status, credit range €50-€2000, interest 2-5%, repayment 3-6 months, 4) Admin Panel has 'Kredit-Verwaltung' tab under 'Finanzen' category with stats and filters, 5) All 10 language translations present (DE, EN, TR, AR, EL, FR, IT, PT, RU, ZH)

backend_eligibility_api.description: Returns eligibility status with all required fields

backend_admin_applications_api.description: Returns all credit applications with status counts

bidblitz_pay_kredit_tab.description: BidBlitz Pay page has 'Kredit' tab in navigation row
bidblitz_pay_kredit_tab.tab_position: Last tab in horizontal scrollable navigation

features_visible: Stats cards: Ausstehend, Aktiv, €0 Ausstehend, Zurückgezahlt
Filter buttons: Alle, Pending, Approved, Active, Repaid, Rejected
Search input for E-Mail, Name oder ID

critical_code_review_comments: credit_system.py: Well-structured API with proper validation for amount (€50-€2000), interest rate (2-5%), and repayment months (3-6)
CreditSystem.jsx: Multi-step application flow with document upload, eligibility check, and payment tracking
AdminCreditManagement.jsx: Complete admin interface with document viewer, decision workflow, and credit activation
Admin.js line 1237: Kredit-Verwaltung correctly placed under Finanzen category
BidBlitzPay.jsx line 1258-1267: Kredit tab added with Banknote icon and proper view state handling
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit System (Kredit-System) fully tested: 1) Backend APIs at /api/credit/* all working, 2) BidBlitz Pay at /pay has Kredit tab (last in navigation), 3) CreditSystem.jsx shows eligibility, credit range €50-€2000, interest 2-5%, repayment 3-6 months, 4) Admin Panel has Kredit-Verwaltung under Finanzen with stats and filters, 5) All 10 language translations present. Note: Route is /pay or /wallet, NOT /bidblitz-pay
